provenance.alignment_rule: union calendar across venues; missing venue/day stays an explicit null; no forward-fill, no interpolation, no truncation to the intersection
provenance.daily_aggregation: daily slot closing at D 00:00Z sums funding events with time in [D-1 00:00Z, D 00:00Z) — the FUND-EV1 convention; per-day event counts recorded; partial days reported, never scaled or filled

endpoints.hyperliquid/spot_1d: POST https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info type=candleSnapshot interval=1d spot pair id (<=5000 candles)
endpoints.kraken/spot_1d: GET https://api.kraken.com/0/public/OHLC interval=1440 (single call; venue caps history at last 720 candles)
endpoints.okx/perp_1d: GET https://www.okx.com/api/v5/market/history-candles bar=1Dutc (paginated 100/page, backward; UTC-aligned bar required)
endpoints.okx/spot_1d: GET https://www.okx.com/api/v5/market/history-candles bar=1Dutc (paginated 100/page, backward; UTC-aligned bar required)

provenance.funding_sign_convention: positive funding rate: longs pay shorts (all five funding venues; kraken uses the price-relative relativeFundingRate)
provenance.kraken_history_limits: spot OHLC capped by the venue at the last 720 daily candles; futures funding endpoint returns a trailing ~1y window — recorded as venue history limits, not filled
provenance.okx_daily_bar_note: OKX fetched with bar=1Dutc — the default OKX 1D bar is UTC+8-aligned and is refused by the midnight-UTC normalizer guard
provenance.okx_funding_history_limit: the public funding-rate-history endpoint serves only a trailing ~3-month window — recorded as a venue history limit, not filled

rate_limits_cited.binance: 2400 request weight/min (fundingRate weight 1, klines weight <=10) — fetcher paces ~4 req/s
rate_limits_cited.bybit: public market endpoints ~600 req/5s per IP — fetcher paces ~4 req/s
rate_limits_cited.coinbase: public market data ~10 req/s per IP — fetcher paces ~4 req/s
rate_limits_cited.hyperliquid: info endpoint weight budget 1200/min (fundingHistory weight 20) — fetcher paces ~1 req/s
rate_limits_cited.kraken: spot public ~1 req/s counterised; futures public charts/funding uncounted light use — fetcher paces ~1 req/s
rate_limits_cited.okx: funding-rate-history 10 req/2s, history-candles 10 req/2s per IP — fetcher paces ~3 req/s

provenance.zero_volume_backfill_note: some venues publish price candles from before their own market traded (Hyperliquid perps: zero-volume daily candles back to 2020-08; real HL trading starts at the first nonzero-volume candle). Zero-volume rows are kept exactly as the venue serves them and counted per series in coverage.zero_volume_rows / first_nonzero_volume_close so backfill is never mistaken for market history

snapshot_home_note: MF-REPLAY1 moved the snapshot home from /tmp/money-flow-data1/raw_series (cleared by macOS) to the durable ignored repo path var/data1/raw_series; artifact bytes and sha256 values unchanged by the move

window.end_rule: last fully closed UTC day at fetch time; in-progress rows always dropped
